text.en: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
text.th: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

text.en: General summary
text.th: General summary

text.en: Google is releasing Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model, across more Google products. You can now create longer tracks up to 3 minutes and customize elements like verses and choruses. Lyria 3 Pro is available in Vertex AI, Google AI Studio, the Gemini API, Google Vids, the Gemini app, and ProducerAI, so you can scale music production and experiment with different styles.
text.th: Google is releasing Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model, across more Google products. You can now create longer tracks up to 3 minutes and customize elements like verses and choruses. Lyria 3 Pro is available in Vertex AI, Google AI Studio, the Gemini API, Google Vids, the Gemini app, and ProducerAI, so you can scale music production and experiment with different styles.

text.en: Bullet points
text.th: Bullet points

text.en: "Lyria 3 Pro" lets you create longer, more customized music tracks in more Google products.
text.th: "Lyria 3 Pro" lets you create longer, more customized music tracks in more Google products.

text.en: Lyria 3 Pro creates songs up to 3 minutes long, with intros, verses, choruses, and bridges.
text.th: Lyria 3 Pro creates songs up to 3 minutes long, with intros, verses, choruses, and bridges.

text.en: You can now access Lyria 3 Pro in Vertex AI, Google AI Studio, Gemini, and Google Vids.
text.th: You can now access Lyria 3 Pro in Vertex AI, Google AI Studio, Gemini, and Google Vids.

text.en: Google is partnering with musicians to responsibly develop AI music tools like Lyria 3 Pro.
text.th: Google is partnering with musicians to responsibly develop AI music tools like Lyria 3 Pro.

text.en: Lyria 3 Pro outputs are watermarked and designed to avoid mimicking existing artists.
text.th: Lyria 3 Pro outputs are watermarked and designed to avoid mimicking existing artists.

text.en: Basic explainer
text.th: Basic explainer

text.en: Google made a new AI model called Lyria 3 Pro that makes music. It can now create longer songs up to 3 minutes and understand song structure better. People can use it in different Google apps like Vids and Gemini to make custom music. Google is working with musicians to make sure the AI helps them be creative.
text.th: Google made a new AI model called Lyria 3 Pro that makes music. It can now create longer songs up to 3 minutes and understand song structure better. People can use it in different Google apps like Vids and Gemini to make custom music. Google is working with musicians to make sure the AI helps them be creative.

text.en: Your browser does not support the audio element.
text.th: Your browser does not support the audio element.

text.en: Last month, we introduced Lyria 3, featuring custom music generation designed to spark creative expression. Now, we’re bringing our most advanced music generation model to more Google products, and introducing Lyria 3 Pro. This advanced version allows the creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long, with customization and creative control. Lyria 3 Pro better understands musical composition, so you can now prompt for specific elements like intros, verses, choruses and bridges. It’s great for experimenting with different styles or generating songs with complex transitions.
text.th: Last month, we introduced Lyria 3, featuring custom music generation designed to spark creative expression. Now, we’re bringing our most advanced music generation model to more Google products, and introducing Lyria 3 Pro. This advanced version allows the creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long, with customization and creative control. Lyria 3 Pro better understands musical composition, so you can now prompt for specific elements like intros, verses, choruses and bridges. It’s great for experimenting with different styles or generating songs with complex transitions.

text.en: Your browser does not support the audio element.

text.en: Providing new places to generate music
text.th: Providing new places to generate music

text.en: High-quality music generation should be accessible wherever creativity happens. Whether you are an app developer, a business or music professional, or a creator, these integrations allow you to use Lyria’s advanced musical awareness to scale your production.
text.th: High-quality music generation should be accessible wherever creativity happens. Whether you are an app developer, a business or music professional, or a creator, these integrations allow you to use Lyria’s advanced musical awareness to scale your production.

text.en: Vertex AI: Lyria 3 Pro is now in public preview on Vertex AI for businesses who require on-demand audio at scale. It gives organizations the ability to scale high-fidelity production, from rapidly generating bespoke soundtracks for gaming to integrating into creative tools, music and video platforms.
text.th: Vertex AI: Lyria 3 Pro is now in public preview on Vertex AI for businesses who require on-demand audio at scale. It gives organizations the ability to scale high-fidelity production, from rapidly generating bespoke soundtracks for gaming to integrating into creative tools, music and video platforms.

text.en: Google AI Studio and the Gemini API: For developers building the next generation of creative tools, Lyria 3 provides improved musical awareness and structural coherence to offer creative flexibility. Lyria 3 Pro is now available alongside Lyria RealTime in AI Studio.
text.th: Google AI Studio and the Gemini API: For developers building the next generation of creative tools, Lyria 3 provides improved musical awareness and structural coherence to offer creative flexibility. Lyria 3 Pro is now available alongside Lyria RealTime in AI Studio.

text.en: Google Vids: Vids is an AI-powered video creation app that anyone can use. With Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro in Vids, you can add custom music that matches your style for everything from creative projects to marketing videos. This is rolling out to Google Workspace customers and Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers starting this week.
text.th: Google Vids: Vids is an AI-powered video creation app that anyone can use. With Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro in Vids, you can add custom music that matches your style for everything from creative projects to marketing videos. This is rolling out to Google Workspace customers and Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers starting this week.

text.en: Gemini app: Longer generations with Lyria 3 Pro are now available in the Gemini app, starting with paid subscribers. Lyria 3 Pro’s enhanced customization offers more space to experiment and play with longer tracks. So now, you can add more details to bring your full vision to life, or create personalized tracks for vlogs, podcasts or tutorial videos.
text.th: Gemini app: Longer generations with Lyria 3 Pro are now available in the Gemini app, starting with paid subscribers. Lyria 3 Pro’s enhanced customization offers more space to experiment and play with longer tracks. So now, you can add more details to bring your full vision to life, or create personalized tracks for vlogs, podcasts or tutorial videos.

text.en: ProducerAI: We recently introduced ProducerAI, a collaborative music creation tool, built by musicians looking for new ways to enhance their creative process. With Lyria 3 Pro, ProducerAI offers an agentic experience designed to help artists, producers and songwriters at every level iterate on comprehensive songs. It’s available globally to free and paid subscribers.
text.th: ProducerAI: We recently introduced ProducerAI, a collaborative music creation tool, built by musicians looking for new ways to enhance their creative process. With Lyria 3 Pro, ProducerAI offers an agentic experience designed to help artists, producers and songwriters at every level iterate on comprehensive songs. It’s available globally to free and paid subscribers.

text.en: Partnering with creatives
text.th: Partnering with creatives

text.en: We have been developing our music generation tools responsibly and in close partnership with the industry to ensure AI serves as a tool for creative expression.
text.th: We have been developing our music generation tools responsibly and in close partnership with the industry to ensure AI serves as a tool for creative expression.

text.en: Through our Music AI Sandbox, we provide musicians, producers and songwriters with a suite of experimental tools designed to expand their creative horizons. The insights from this collaboration helped shape the development of Lyria 3.
text.th: Through our Music AI Sandbox, we provide musicians, producers and songwriters with a suite of experimental tools designed to expand their creative horizons. The insights from this collaboration helped shape the development of Lyria 3.

text.en: We’re inviting artists to integrate AI into their workflows to make sure our technology helps the people who use it. Grammy-winning producer Yung Spielburg used Lyria in his composition and production process for the score of the Google DeepMind short film “Dear Upstairs Neighbors.” And we’re also collaborating with DJ and producer François K, who used Lyria in an iterative process to create a soon-to-be-released song.
text.th: We’re inviting artists to integrate AI into their workflows to make sure our technology helps the people who use it. Grammy-winning producer Yung Spielburg used Lyria in his composition and production process for the score of the Google DeepMind short film “Dear Upstairs Neighbors.” And we’re also collaborating with DJ and producer François K, who used Lyria in an iterative process to create a soon-to-be-released song.

text.en: Responsibility was foundational, and remains integral in the design and training of Lyria 3, using materials that YouTube and Google has a right to use under our terms of service, partner agreements, and applicable law. To protect original expression, Lyria 3 and Gemini do not mimic artists; if a prompt names a creator, the model takes that as broad inspiration. Additionally, we employ filters to check outputs against existing content and users must adhere to the Terms of Service and Gen AI prohibited use policies, which prohibit violating others' intellectual property and privacy rights. All Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro outputs are embedded with SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for identifying Google AI-generated content.
text.th: Responsibility was foundational, and remains integral in the design and training of Lyria 3, using materials that YouTube and Google has a right to use under our terms of service, partner agreements, and applicable law. To protect original expression, Lyria 3 and Gemini do not mimic artists; if a prompt names a creator, the model takes that as broad inspiration. Additionally, we employ filters to check outputs against existing content and users must adhere to the Terms of Service and Gen AI prohibited use policies, which prohibit violating others' intellectual property and privacy rights. All Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro outputs are embedded with SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for identifying Google AI-generated content.

text.en: Lyria 3 Pro is rolling out to professionals, developers, organizations and everyday creators to help craft high quality music generations.
text.th: Lyria 3 Pro is rolling out to professionals, developers, organizations and everyday creators to help craft high quality music generations.
